characters.name: Fab Four and Frankie
characters.description: Expy: The Zhus are based on their Quest for Zhu and toy counterparts. Mr. Squiggles is regularly squiggling scientific blueprints. Num Nums is chubbiest of the group.

characters.name: Frankie Pamplemousse
characters.description: Frankie (originally named Polly) is the main, and titular, character of the show. She lives in Anytown with her mom, dad, and four talking hamsters. Abnormal Limb Rotation Range: Frankie's left glenohumeral joint at start of "Story Book It." All There in the Manual: Frankie's age being 8 years old was only confirmed in theVimeointerview for the series, revealed by a writer of the series.Frankie's last name was also this until the show mentioned it (which mostly happens when Madge mentions it). Frankie's last name was also this until the show mentioned it (which mostly happens when Madge mentions it). Alliterative Name: Her old name, Polly Pamplemousse.

characters.name: Pipsqueak
characters.description: Pipsqueak is the first Zhu Zhu, and is the unofficial leader of the Zhus. She was Frankie's first hamster, and would do anything to make her happy. Affectionate Nickname: Pip or Pips. And Call Him "George": In "Zhurassic Park," tomboy Pipsqueak clearlyDoes Not Know His Own Strengthwhen giving Cave Frankie aBear Hugas she is clearly being crushed by her. Cheerful Child: Frankie aside, Pipsqueak is the most cheerful of the Zhus. Inconsistent Spelling: Pipsqueak has been spelt "Pipsqueek" on the Zhu Zhu Pets website.

characters.name: Mr. Squiggles
characters.description: Mr. Squiggles is the second Zhu Zhu, and is the smartest of the Zhus. He likes science. Affectionate Nickname: Mr S., Squiggles, Squiggs Catchphrase: "Pinch my pelt.""Well, that's unfortunate.""It hasn't been tested yet." "Well, that's unfortunate." "It hasn't been tested yet."

characters.name: Num Nums
characters.description: Num Nums is the third Zhu Zhu, and is the most sensitive. She is a careful thinker. Adaptation Dye-Job: In the original toys and theQuest for Zhumovie, her fur was light grey. Here, it's lavender. Affectionate Nickname: Nums, Nummers. Bespectacled Cutie: A cute purple hamster who wears pink glasses and is very shy. Beware the Nice Ones:In "Home Run Hamsters", Num Nums shows herBerserk Buttonwhen Mr. Kerdle calls the Zhus 'runts' and beats him up once he takes it too far.Mr. Kerdle: You runts are going down.Num Nums: What... did you call us?!Pipsqueak: You shouldn't have said that...Chunk: Bad move, mop man.Mr. Squiggles: My theory is that this will add up to trouble for you, sir.Num Nums: Nobody calls us... runts!In "The Trashing of Zhuper Girl", Num Nums almost attacks the TV once Madge mocks and insults the Zhus.Madge: Oh, and don't forget my silly little rats. "Mah-mah, we're lame sidekicks. Look at me! You ever see a flea bag with glasses?"Num Nums: Flea bag? Flea bag?! I'll show you a flea bag!when her quilt gets wrecked.

characters.name: Chunk
characters.description: Chunk is the fourth Zhu Zhu, and is theBig Eaterof the Zhus. Affectionate Nickname: Chunky Big Eater: He really loves to eat. Cross DresserFrankieGoldilocks The Big Guy: He's the tallest of the Fab Four and has quite the appetite.

characters.name: Ellen Pamplemousse
characters.description: Ellen Pamplemousse is Frankie's mother. Action Mom: Beyond being a plumber, she can fix race cars and juggle 3 plungers in a clown nose to entertain a young girl. Seduction-Proof Marriage: So far we know with Ellen. She swoons when Sergio compliments her in "Hairible Mistake" but she doesn't follow up. Unnamed Parent: Referred to as Mom up until Fur-Vivor, when Num Nums refers to her as Ellen. From then on her name is used frequently. Wrench Wench: even uses a giant one as a musical instrument in "How Zhu Get Ahead in Advertising"

characters.name: Stanley Pamplemousse
characters.description: Stanley Pamplemousse is Frankie's father. Cross Dresser:FrankieStar Unnamed Parent: Referred to as Dad. Taken to a case ofAll There in the Manual, where he is referred to as "Stanley" by the Closed Captioning in only one episode ("Deja Zhu"). Even then, this only appears in the early US "Polly" version. It does not appear in the "Frankie" version that airs on YTV in Canada. All other episodes simply refer to him as "Dad", even in the CC and in episodes that refer to Ellen by her real name, in both dialogue and CC.

characters.name: Wilfred P. Kerdle / Mr. Kerdle
characters.description: Mr. Kerdle is the grumpy school janitor that works at Frankie's school. Cross Dresser: Appears in a yellow wig as Frankie in "Zhus the Boss".

characters.name: Cindy and Mindy Gelato
characters.description: Cindy and Mindy Gelato are twins and Frankie's friends. Always Identical Twins: The look exactly the same, but their ice cream color schemes and nearly identical voices can be easy for one to tell them apart. Ambiguously Brown: They have dark skin, but their ethnicity is unknown. Coordinated Clothes: Mindy and Cindy mostly dress the same. Subtle differences in color schemes serve to distinguish them. Identical Twin ID Tag: Mindy has a white ice cream cone, yellow backpack, blue glasses, white bracelet, and dark blue pants, while Cindy has a yellow ice cream cone (pink on shirt), green backpack, pink glasses, blue bracelet, and lighter blue pants.

characters.name: Madge
characters.description: Madge is Frankie's next door neighbor, and herArch-Enemy. Alpha Bitch: Revealed in "The Pumpkin Whisperers" that she does go to Frankie's school. Full-Name Basis: Madge regularly says "Frankie Pamplemousse" instead of just "Frankie" unlike most other characters. Girlish Pigtails: She has her hair up like this. Lonely Rich Kid: She is quick to allow Frankie to spend time at her house when asked, even though they are enemies.

characters.name: Princess Tickyboo
characters.description: Accessory-Wearing Cartoon Animal: She wears a pearl necklace and bow.

characters.name: Whendy Sails
characters.description: Whendy Sails is a news reporter for Channel 5. Meaningful Name: She reports weather (i.e. windy).

characters.name: Jessica Beeker
characters.description: Jessica Beeker is a famous popstar. Cool Crown: She wears a white tiara on her head. Idol Singer: She loves to sing. After all, she is a popstar. Rose-Haired Sweetie: She has dark pink hair, and she's great friends with Frankie.
